items.title: Bitcoin back above $60,000, ETH, SOL recoup losses as AI stocks stage rebound
items.whyYouShouldCare: Bitcoin's resurgence above $60,000 can enhance overall market sentiment, potentially benefiting SOL's liquidity and ecosystem engagement.

items.title: Micron delivers blowout earnings, surges 16% and deals crypto bulls a blow
items.whyYouShouldCare: Micron's strong earnings may shift investor focus away from crypto, impacting SOL's market dynamics and liquidity as attention diversifies.

items.title: Iran-linked entities moved $3.8B through CoinEx, TRM says
items.whyYouShouldCare: The movement of $3.8B by Iran-linked entities through CoinEx raises concerns about regulatory scrutiny, which could affect SOL's ecosystem and user trust.
